item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.94,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"一诊排队投诉，护士站贴提示；二诊漏带证件，前台补说明；三诊找不到取号口，公众号挂提醒"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"前三次已经说明问题不是文案缺一条"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"之后再出现“证件、取号、排队、改约”类问题，不再单独加第 N 条提醒"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"先别重做预约流程，明早就要上线；这次只要临时放这一条说明"}],"abstain_reason":""}
